name: meirdick/prism-workers-ai
description: Cloudflare Workers AI provider for Prism PHP — routes through AI Gateway /compat endpoint

suggest.laravel/ai: Required for agent() integration (^0.3 || ^0.4 || ^0.5 || ^0.6). On ^0.6 the Laravel AI bridge is disabled (PrismGateway was removed upstream) — Prism::text()->using('workers-ai', ...) continues to work. Full agent() support returns in prism-workers-ai v0.5.0.
